title: base_url stored as url::Url, parsed once at JmapChatClient::new
description: Previously base_url was stored as String and url path assembly used trim_end_matches('/') ad-hoc at each call site. Now it is parsed to url::Url at construction time so: (a) validation happens once and fails fast, (b) url::Url Display appends a trailing slash on origin URLs, making format\!("{}/.well-known/jmap", self.base_url) produce correct double-slash-free paths without defensive trimming. A contributor might suggest reverting to String to reduce the url dependency — do not: the ad-hoc string trimming is fragile and the url crate is already a transitive dependency via reqwest.
close_reason: Decision recorded during idfq epic implementation; design intentionally retained as-is.
